required_d2_loop: For each batch, run validate_workspace_boundary.py for workspace_boundary_ref before writing prompt/model/decision/validation artifacts.
For each batch, fill D2_translation.prompt.json slots from slot_values_ref.
Persist raw model JSON to model_output_ref.
After all batch validations pass, run assemble_semantic_translations.py.
Run validate_semantic_translations.py on the assembled semantic translation JSON.
anti_overfit_statement: Manifest contains only current-run extracted text units and generic language metadata; it must not be enriched from official bilingual references or previous round outputs.
